title: Light Filipino Sweet Potato Hash
description: A light and earthy Filipino dish featuring sweet potatoes, onions, and a hint of sugar, perfect for a nostalgic breakfast or snack. This low-fat-friendly recipe is easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced sweet potatoes and cook for about 5 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add the salt, black pepper, and sugar, and stir to combine.
Continue cooking the sweet potatoes for another 10-12 minutes, until they are tender and lightly browned.
Stir in the fish sauce (if using) and cook for another minute.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Transfer the sweet potato hash to a serving platter and top with chopped scallions and a squeeze of calamansi juice.
